headline: KLA Corp (NASDAQ:KLAC) Is a Quality Stock With Durable Competitive Advantages and Strong Cash Generation
summary: KLA Corp (KLAC) is a quality investment pick with durable advantages, 15.3% revenue growth, 78.9% ROIC, and strong cash flow in the semiconductor industry.
